items.title: No behavioral surface — verified by Layer 1 tests
items.precondition: PR #165 remains a dormant pure internal foundation with no route, worker, schedule, agent-registry entry, UI, API, or other production caller.
items.expected: Layer 2 is not applicable until a future slice wires a production caller and owns live database/provider acceptance.
items.evidence: Fresh verification on code head c7eb4212d3daa76201e0c5ea1d8eb4defa536441 with Node 22.23.1: focused A3 Vitest 1/1 file and 138/138 tests passed; normal full npm test 61/61 files and 594/594 tests passed; TypeScript npx tsc --noEmit exited 0; npm run check:conventions -- --strict exited 0 with 0 structural backend violations; git diff --check exited 0 after this evidence-only edit.
items.notes: This single N/A item is the canonical Layer-2 record for an internal-only change. The previous artifact incorrectly mixed 22 passing Layer-1 checks with five live database/provider checks, then reported contradictory 21/26 and 22/27 totals. The live migration, PostgreSQL idempotency behavior, Gemini, SerpApi, and Perplexity checks are neither passed nor waived here; they are outside this dormant slice and become acceptance requirements of the future executor/caller wiring slice. Strict-conventions advisories remain pre-existing and outside PR #165: 1 historical migration over the size ceiling, 20 route files without an inline auth reference, 1 dangerouslySetInnerHTML file, 2 token-read files, 6 backend .raw() integration-test files, and 102 tenant-scope heuristic model entries.
